rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Further Response To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions; Memorandum
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 7, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG's Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions Continued to April 29, 2014. Moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with SFRO 2.6B no later than April 11, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS MURRAY JR. VS. ANOUSHIRAVAN MASSOUMI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For An Order To 1) Compel Inspection Of Premises (Set One) 2) Award Monetary Sanctions (Attorney'S Fees And Costs) And Statement Demand In Dispute
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 7, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT ANOUSHIRAVAN MASSOUMI's Motion For An Order To 1) Compel Inspection Of Premises (Set One) 2) Award Monetary Sanctions (Attorney'S Fees And Costs) Denied. The motion is untimely (Motion was to be fled no later than March 1, 2014; file don March 10, 2014). pursuant to CCP § 2031.310(c). Defendant/Cross-Complainant is to pay attorneys' fees in the amount of $825 to Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant for bringing an improper motion. = (501/REQ)
